focus: C568: Calibration gap root cause analysis
deliverables: Built scripts/calibration_gap_analysis.py — hypothesis testing for 9.43% humidity gap
Root cause identified: with one GT point, bias and environmental change are confounded
Kalman estimated bias 45.93% but direct observation implies 37.1% — 8.8% overestimate
DHT22 reads ~98% when true is ~61%: suggests sensor degradation or moisture trapping
Forward prediction P_C568_CALIBRATION_GAP — resolvable with second GT measurement
next: Request second ground-truth measurement from Creator, or build bias correction tool that accounts for environmental change hypothesis
